name: Tim Ryan
subject: From my family to yours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Friends,

I won't take up too much of your time. Of the many things people hope to find under the tree this time of year, another email typically isn't among them!

I just wanted to take a moment to wish you a joyous and restful holiday season. When I look back at the past year and think of all the struggles we faced and the victories we won, I can't help but think about how they were only possible because of you and your tireless support.

With you in my corner, I'm feeling as optimistic as ever going into 2019 that we'll be able to continue our fight for what is right and just. It will not always be easy, but meaningful progress never is.

Thank you again for your support -- and from my family to yours, I'm wishing you a healthy and prosperous new year ahead.

Thanks for all you do,

\-- Tim

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
---
**Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
If you'd no longer like to receive emails, please [UNSUBSCRIBE](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90d0/5486deaa/25468d7d/dcf49b4/722067859/VEsH/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe")

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Merry Christmas!
body:
| | Peter, There’s one thing I especially love about the Christmas season that I wanted to share with you. I recorded this special message that I hope encourages you this Christmas. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k_0DN6-9d2OWatvhPqLg3Dc&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181224xmas01&n=1) [https://youtu.be/KLRPvBom-MI](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k_0DN6-9d2OWatvhPqLg3Dc&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181224xmas01&n=2) From my family to yours, Merry Christmas! **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181224xmas01&n=3)

name: Tim Kaine and Anne Holton
subject: Christmas 2018
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Dear Derek,

Anne and I will join her parents tonight and tomorrow to celebrate Christmas before meeting our children on the 26th for some precious family time. We hope that you are able to spend time with your family over the holidays.

At church tomorrow, we will think about the enduring message of a young couple turned away because there was no room for them, only to give birth to their child in a humble stable.

The world is filled with millions of families seeking refuge from war, starvation, addiction, illness, loneliness, violence, depression, climate disaster. Some are halfway around the world and some are in our own neighborhoods. And the Christmas message challenges us--will we say that there's no room at the inn?

The question calls to mind another innkeeper from the Christian scripture--the innkeeper in the parable of the Good Samaritan who agrees to take care of the man beaten on the road to Jericho.

We are all like innkeepers--people show up in our lives with all kinds of needs, obvious and hidden, and how we choose how to treat them becomes a fundamental moral choice that reveals our character.

We pray for wisdom to choose correctly. Blessings and thanks from our family to you!

Tim and Anne
---
* * *
|
---
[](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1759/3e0906/7a0dae8d/3e375a72/303616545/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20181224_1_NA_TK_Christmas&source=20181224_1_NA_TK_Christmas") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1759/3e0906/7a0dae8d/3e375a71/303616545/VEsE/ "https://twitter.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20181224_1_NA_TK_Christmas&source=20181224_1_NA_TK_Christmas") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1759/3e0906/7a0dae8d/3e375a70/303616545/VEsF/ "https://www.instagram.com/timkaine/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20181224_1_NA_TK_Christmas&source=20181224_1_NA_TK_Christmas")
